mapper.select: SELECT ri.item_id, ri.item_name, ri.max_score, ri.weight, ri.description, ri.sort_order FROM rubric_items ri JOIN rubrics r ON ri.rubric_id = r.rubric_id WHERE r.assignment_id = #{assignmentId} ORDER BY ri.sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rubric_items (rubric_id, item_name, max_score, weight, description, sort_order) VALUES (#{rubricId}, #{itemName}, #{maxScore}, #{weight}, #{description}, #{sortOrder})
